label: Gene template
description: Template used to procedurally generate genes for a specific skill or chemical. The game expands each template into a concrete GeneDef for every applicable skill or chemical.

geneClass.label: Gene class
geneClass.description: C# Gene subclass instantiated at runtime for each expanded gene. Must be Gene or a subclass.

biostatCpx.label: Biostat complexity
biostatCpx.description: Complexity biostat contributed by genes expanded from this template.

biostatMet.label: Biostat metabolism
biostatMet.description: Metabolism biostat contributed by genes expanded from this template. Negative values increase food consumption; positive values reduce it.

aptitudeOffset.label: Aptitude offset
aptitudeOffset.description: Skill aptitude offset applied by genes expanded from this template. Used only when geneTemplateType is Skill.

addictionChanceFactor.label: Addiction chance factor
addictionChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on addiction chance for genes expanded from this template. Used only when geneTemplateType is Chemical. 0 means immune.

passionModType.label: Passion mod type
passionModType.description: How passion for the skill is modified. AddOneLevel raises passion by one tier; DropAll removes all passion. Used only when geneTemplateType is Skill.

geneTemplateType.label: Gene template type
geneTemplateType.description: Whether this template expands into skill-aptitude genes or chemical-relationship genes.

minAgeActive.label: Min age active
minAgeActive.description: Minimum biological age in years before genes expanded from this template become active.

displayCategory.label: Display category
displayCategory.description: GeneCategoryDef that groups expanded genes in the gene editor UI.

displayOrderOffset.label: Display order offset
displayOrderOffset.description: Sort offset within the display category. Lower values appear earlier.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative probability that genes expanded from this template are chosen during random xenotype generation.

chemicalBiostatOverrides.label: Chemical biostat overrides
chemicalBiostatOverrides.description: Per-chemical biostat overrides. Each entry replaces the template-level biostat values for a specific chemical. Used only when geneTemplateType is Chemical.

labelShortAdj.label: Label short adjective
labelShortAdj.description: Short adjective label shown in condensed UI contexts for expanded genes. Supports {0} substitution for the skill or chemical name.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Content-relative path to the icon texture for expanded genes. Supports {0} substitution for the skill or chemical defName.

exclusionTagPrefix.label: Exclusion tag prefix
exclusionTagPrefix.description: Prefix used to generate exclusion tags on expanded genes. Genes sharing any exclusion tag cannot be active simultaneously.
